docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO JANUARY 7, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M. D. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-28-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-10-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-07-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE BLANCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE DUE TO NON-SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-13-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$135.00) SERVED MAY-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, MICHELLE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURNCE. DEFENDANT MICHELLE BLANCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP OF TOWING AND SAYEED SHAH, DIRECTOR SERVICE DELIVERY. DEFENDANT MICHELLE BLANCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCO, MICHELLE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
